art_market.summary: Korean art market in March 2026 is undergoing a qualitative transformation with a focus on trust, discernment, and accessibility over volume.
key_events: 20! 2026 Art Seoul: Digital exhibit with 80% refund guarantee system launched March 16.
Major Exhibitions: Damien Hirst retrospective at MMCA Seoul; Kim Yun-shin retrospective at Hoam Museum.
Ongoing focus on transparency and blockchain authentication.
art_market.outlook: Cautious adjustment; market prioritizes works with rarity and clear provenance.

stock_market.summary: KOSPI rebounding strongly following early March sell-off driven by geopolitical tensions; Goldman Sachs maintains optimistic outlook.

key_indicators.KOSPI: Rebounding after correcting 20% from February highs; target raised to 7,000 by Goldman Sachs.
key_indicators.Outlook: Earnings growth forecast revised up to 130%; semiconductor sector remains a strong driver.
